design_philosophy: Dark luxury editorial, Awwwards-style, heavy emphasis on cinematic motion and restrained high-end visuals. No generic SaaS aesthetics, no large 3D interactive objects. Relies on negative space, asymmetric layouts, and contrast between elegant serif typography and deep backgrounds.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-light

effects.blur_reveal: filter: blur(10px), opacity: 0 -> filter: blur(0px), opacity: 1

profile_photo.description: Indian young man in dark suit, glasses, curly hair. Must be cut/masked with soft glow on dark bg. Used prominently in hero.

project_placeholders.description: Modern server rack with blue lighting in a secure data center environment. Used for Secure Cloud Storage System project.
Code lines on a computer screen. Used for coding related project placeholders.

icons.usage: Use simple stroke icons. Do not use filled colorful logos.

layout_philosophy.alignment: Predominantly left-aligned for text. High reliance on asymmetrical bento/editorial grids.
layout_philosophy.surfaces: Minimal cards. Rely on generous padding, borders, and typography to separate content. Avoid solid background cards where possible.
layout_philosophy.glassmorphism: Used selectively (e.g., sticky navbar). High opacity base with heavy blur and 1px delicate inner stroke: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0D0D0D]/70 border border-white/5.
layout_philosophy.three_js: Very subtle, almost invisible ambient background. E.g., tsParticles with slow drift, or a soft glowing sphere using react-three-fiber far in the background. No interactive floating geometry.

navbar.style: Floating glassmorphism, rounded-full or pill shape. Items: Home, About, Skills, Projects, Articles, Coding Profiles, Contact.
navbar.classes: fixed top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50 px-6 py-3 rounded-full backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0D0D0D]/70 border border-white/10

hero.structure: Split or asymmetrical. Left: Editorial large typography. Right: Huge profile photo with premium frame and soft purple/blue glow.
hero.content: Headline: 'Building Secure Cloud Infrastructure with Python, AWS & Modern Security Practices.' 3 CTAs (View Projects, Download Resume, Contact Me).

about.style: Editorial storytelling style. IT student -> Python journey -> AWS -> Cybersecurity -> Storage admin.
about.visuals: Scroll reveal text, heavy use of the heading font for key phrases. Parallax effects on background elements.

skills.style: Premium typography cards. NO progress bars or charts. Categories: Cloud Computing, Cybersecurity, Programming, Infrastructure & Storage, Tools.

projects.style: Editorial case-study layout. Large edge-to-edge images, alternating sides for text and imagery.
projects.featured: Secure Cloud Storage System Using Homomorphic Encryption (Hero Image, Problem, Solution, Architecture, Technologies, Outcome).

articles.style: List layout or refined cards. 4 placeholders: AWS EC2, Linux Security Hardening, Python for Cloud Automation, Homomorphic Encryption.

coding_profiles.style: Premium minimalist cards for GitHub and LeetCode. Show stats textually using large typography.

contact.style: Clean EmailJS form integrated seamlessly into the background surface. Name/Email/Subject/Message. Simple bordered inputs.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Background must be #050505.
Do not build standard SaaS cards for skills; use elegant typography lists or minimal outlines.
The Hero profile photo MUST be prominent and use the exact URL provided.
Implement tsParticles for a subtle ambient background (very slow moving, low opacity, soft blue/purple stars or connections).
Use Framer Motion for scroll-linked reveals and soft entry animations. It should feel luxurious and slow.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Use Cormorant Garamond for all headings and Manrope for body text. Apply them via Google Fonts.
